description:
Operating Area: Adriatic Sea, Croatia, Montenegro

SEA LADY, an outstanding 26.40 m model made by renowned Italian shipyard Dalla Pietta can carry up to 9 guests accommodated in 4 beautifully decorated cabins and 3 crew members.
The yacht is fully refitted in 2019 and last refit was in 2024, offering her guests an elegant and fresh look. Being one of the rarest handcrafted Italian yachts SEA LADY boasts with impeccable Italian design and outstanding German engineering with 4000 HP MTU Rolls Royce engines. To ensure the most relaxed charter vacation on this luxury motor yacht, there are 3 experienced crew members - Captain, Stewardess/cook and Deckhand.

SEA LADY is an enclosed hardtop luxury motor yacht, defined by elegant and modern lines with warm shades of beige and wood-furnished interiors. This Dalla Pieta 80 is an ideal blend of comfort and power, with a great performance hull beyond the norm for a yacht of this size.
There are two sets of sun pads on the bow, perfect for chilling on a lazy summer day. Furthermore, the main deck on the aft offers a wide sun pad overlooking the stern and a dining area by the salon entrance. SEA LADY is also equipped with large swimming platform for enjoying water-sport activities.


Being spacious outside SEA LADY also offers plenty of living areas inside, with bright interior and light atmosphere. There is a beautiful salon with floor-ceiling glass doors leading to deck and doors on starboard. In this elegantly designed area, there is a U- shaped sofa with a flexible table so the space can be used as a lounge or dining room.
Dalla Pieta 80 can accommodate 9 guests in 4 cabins on the lower deck: 1 Master, 1 VIP and 2 Twin cabins where 1 Twin has a pullman bed for an extra person on board. All the cabins are well maintained and benefit from the comfort of ensuite bathroom facilities.

SEA LADY Yacht for Charter is available in Croatia and is located in Trogir as the Homeport.

blueprint.name: SEA LADY
entertainment: TV in saloon and all cabins

crew.name: Mislav Dekovic
crew.bio:
Nationality: Croatian

In his early years, Mislav spent studying and practicing in Maritime High School and gained all possible certificates. He is a very enthusiastic person who has over twenty years of experience in the marine industry, ranging from instructor and teacher in Maritime school to the Captain of 86-foot luxury motor yachts. He is the one to provide his guests a safe, comfortable and unforgettable experience, as well as keeping the yacht in mint condition. Mislav is flexible when it comes to client preferences and at the same time an excellent crew leader, responsible for creating a great atmosphere among the crew and clients. Fluent in English.

crew.name: Kristina Vujić
crew.bio:
Nationality: Croatian

Born and raised in Croatia, in Petrinja, a small town southeast of Zagreb. Kristina has been working in hospitality the whole of her life, she worked and was surrounded by people who suited her easygoing, positive and open-minded character. Kristina has decided to embark on a new adventure and join the yachting industry, and it was the best decision she made. Working on the yacht is not just a job, to her it represents a true and great pleasure, and having happy and satisfied guests is Kristina's greatest reward. She is fluent in English.

crew.name: Danijel Zikovic
crew.bio:
Nationality: Croatian

Danijel has been professionally involved in the nautical sector from a young age, gaining experience in maintenance, cleaning, polishing, and repairing various types of vessels, as well as overseeing underwater work on yachts, motorboats, and sailboats. He also spent a couple of years working in Italy, further expanding his expertise with different types and sizes of vessels.

Fluent in Italian and German, Danijel communicates effectively in English as well. Danijel is a communicative, social, and team-oriented person who values collaboration and is always open to learning from others.
